response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience, including recent full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq. A strong testing and software-craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks) aligns well with the role's quality expectations. Gaps are mostly framework-specific — no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest experience — and appear learnable given the breadth demonstrated across languages and platforms.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB production work
Hands-on AI-agent development and MCP tooling experience, a rare required skill
Deep testing culture: TDD practitioner, built test frameworks, taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest experience listed in the primary stack
Currently in a career gap since October 2025, which may need ramp-up discussion
Significant portion of career in niche DLang rather than the JVM/Python languages listed

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and Kotlin from primary/secondary stack
